prd_metadata.description: vSPACE Augmented PRD - Features requiring SDE-in-the-Loop oversight with pre-provided secrets/credentials. Contains features F-104 through F-108 that depend on external Azure services, Entra Verified ID, and API authentication gates.

execution_requirements.sde_role: EitL Tutors overseeing progress and providing auth/keys/creds in advance
human_intervention_points: Azure AD Premium P2 licensing verification
Azure service provisioning (App Service, AKS, Cosmos DB, Key Vault, AI Search, OpenAI)
DID document registration at did:web endpoint

requirements: SDE-in-the-Loop MUST provide all Azure credentials before execution begins
MSAL OAuth2 tokens MUST be pre-acquired with VerifiableCredential.Create.All permission
Azure AD Premium P2 or Microsoft Entra Suite licensing MUST be verified
Entra Verified ID sandbox tenant MUST be configured and accessible
DID document MUST be registered at https://vspacevote.com/.well-known/did.json
Azure App Service instances MUST be provisioned for vSpaceVote.com and vSpaceWallet.com
Azure AI Search MUST be configured for vector store indexing
Azure OpenAI Service MUST be provisioned with appropriate quotas
All secrets MUST be exported as environment variables before ralph_loop starts
execution_constraints.execution_boundary: Features execute against live Azure services - NOT local simulation. Requires production-grade cloud infrastructure.

identity_management.description: Microsoft Entra Verified ID Bridge - W3C Verifiable Credential infrastructure for voter identity verification

features.name: Entra Verified ID Bridge
features.overview: Handles all communication with Microsoft Entra Verified ID services for W3C Verifiable Credential issuance and presentation via the did:web method. Implements a three-phase model: Registration (VC issuance attesting voter eligibility), Credential Derivation (oblivious protocol bridging Entra VC to SAAC anonymous credential), and Voting (only the anonymous credential is used - the Entra VC is never presented to the voting system).
features.business_value: Provides enterprise-grade, standards-compliant identity verification while preserving complete unlinkability between voter identity and ballot through the oblivious credential derivation protocol.
features.user_benefits: Voters can prove eligibility using their existing Microsoft Authenticator wallet, receiving a verifiable credential that bridges to anonymous voting credentials without revealing identity at voting time.

entra_apis.purpose: Admin API - Service provisioning, DID registration, contract management

external_services: Azure AD Premium P2 or Microsoft Entra Suite
infrastructure: Azure AD tenant with admin consent

functional_requirements.description: Issuance flow shall trigger VoterEligibilityCredential creation via Entra createIssuanceRequest API
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Voter receives VC in Microsoft Authenticator wallet with correct claims (election ID, precinct, blinded commitment)

functional_requirements.description: Presentation flow shall verify voter VC via Entra createPresentationRequest callback
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Verified claims including blinded commitment are received at callback URL; invalid VCs are rejected

functional_requirements.description: Oblivious credential derivation shall bridge Entra VC to SAAC anonymous credential
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: SAAC credential is correctly derived from blinded commitment in VC; Entra service cannot link VC to SAAC credential

functional_requirements.description: DID document shall be resolvable at did:web well-known URL
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: https://vspacevote.com/.well-known/did.json resolves to valid DID document with election authority public keys

functional_requirements.description: OAuth2 token acquisition shall use MSAL with VerifiableCredential.Create.All permission
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Valid access tokens are acquired for all Entra API calls; token refresh is handled automatically

validation_rules.rule: VC issuance only after identity verification
VC presentation only during credential derivation
validation_rules.security_requirement: VC never presented to voting system
No cloud dependency on election day; Entra availability risk mitigated

validation_rules.rule: Azure AD app with admin consent required

features.gate_criteria: Entra sandbox issuance/presentation flows succeed. Oblivious credential derivation works. 100-voter simulation with live Entra VCs.

setup_actions: Create Azure AD app registration with VerifiableCredential.Create.All permission
Obtain admin consent for the app
Configure Entra Verified ID service in tenant
Create VoterEligibilityCredential contract
Register DID document at did:web endpoint
Test VC issuance/presentation in sandbox
sde_requirements.timing_constraint: All setup MUST complete before election day; credential derivation occurs pre-election

user_applications.description: FastHTML Progressive Web Applications for voter-facing ballot marking and credential wallet management

features.name: vSpaceVote.com Voter-Facing PWA
features.overview: A Progressive Web Application built with FastHTML for ballot marking, credential presentation, and election participation. Deployed to Azure App Service with PWA capabilities (service worker, web manifest, offline caching of election manifest). Uses HTMX-based server-rendered partials (<2KB per interaction) for sequential, server-validated voter interactions.
features.business_value: Enprises accessible, WCAG-compliant ballot marking interface that validates every voter action server-side against election rules and cryptographic constraints, eliminating client-side tampering risks.
features.user_benefits: Voters can mark ballots from any device with a browser; accessibility features support screen readers and audio descriptions; tracking codes enable ballot verification.

technical_context.deployment: Azure App Service Premium v3, Linux
technical_context.cdn: Azure Front Door for DDoS protection
technical_context.service_worker: Cache-first for static, network-first for dynamic
technical_context.csp_headers: Same-origin scripts only - no inline JavaScript

routes.purpose: Landing page with NLWeb natural language search
Credential presentation trigger (invokes F-107 cross-origin flow)
Ballot marking with HTMX partials per contest
Complete ballot review with plain-language summary and audio description
Server-side encryption, tracking code generation, cast/spoil choice
Tracking code display with QR code, link to public record

functional_requirements.description: Ballot marking interface shall render all eligible contests with server-side validation of selection limits
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Over-selections are rejected; under-selections produce warnings; UI updates via HTMX partials

functional_requirements.description: PWA service worker shall cache election manifest for offline review while requiring server connection for all cryptographic operations
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Cached manifest loads offline; ballot encryption, credential presentation, and nonce generation fail gracefully without server

functional_requirements.description: Ballot review page shall present plain-language summary with accessibility-focused audio description
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance verified; screen reader navigation of all ballot choices

functional_requirements.description: Tracking code display shall include QR code and link to public election record
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Tracking code resolves to correct ballot in the published election record

performance_targets.pwa_install: Progressive enhancement - no mandatory app install

features.gate_criteria: FastHTML skeleton deployed and functional. 100-voter simulation with live Entra VCs.
features.verification_method: 100-voter simulation with live Entra VCs; WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit

setup_actions: Create Azure App Service Premium v3 plan
Deploy FastHTML application container
Configure Azure Front Door with custom domain
Enable auto-scaling for 100K concurrent target
Deploy service worker and web manifest
Configure Application Insights dashboard

features.name: vSpaceWallet.com Credential Wallet PWA
features.overview: A credential management PWA on a separate domain from vSpaceVote.com to enforce the same-origin security boundary between credential management and ballot operations. Handles credential receipt/storage (IndexedDB, encrypted), multi-holder credential share coordination, and credential lifecycle management. Manages the Entra Verified ID issuance callback flow and SAAC oblivious credential derivation.
features.business_value: Separates credential management from voting operations via same-origin boundary, preventing ballot operations from accessing credential storage while enabling secure cross-origin credential presentation.
features.user_benefits: Voters can manage their anonymous credentials in a dedicated wallet; multi-holder shares can be distributed across devices for theft resistance; credential lifecycle is visible and controllable.

credential_operations: Secondary share delivery to backup device

functional_requirements.description: Credential storage shall use encrypted IndexedDB with device-derived key
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Credential data is unreadable without device authentication; encrypted at rest

functional_requirements.description: Multi-holder share coordination shall support threshold presentation protocol
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Primary and secondary shares produce valid combined presentation

functional_requirements.description: Credential lifecycle dashboard shall display status, expiration, and re-issuance options
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: All credential states (active, expired, revoked) are correctly displayed

features.gate_criteria: Credential receipt/storage functional. Credential lifecycle integration tests.
features.verification_method: Credential lifecycle integration tests; IndexedDB encryption verification

setup_actions: Create separate Azure App Service for wallet domain
Configure custom domain vSpaceWallet.com
Enable HTTPS with managed certificates
Configure Entra VC callback URL pointing to wallet instance

features.name: Cross-Origin Communication Protocol
features.overview: Mediates interaction between vSpaceVote.com and vSpaceWallet.com via a carefully designed cross-origin protocol. Supports same-browser flow (window.postMessage with origin whitelist) and cross-device flow (QR code-based challenge-response via authenticated WebSocket). Signed postMessage responses use credential-derived keys.
features.business_value: Enables secure credential presentation across domains without violating same-origin security boundaries, supporting both same-browser and cross-device voting scenarios.
features.user_benefits: Voters can present credentials from their wallet app while marking ballots in the voting app; cross-device fallback supports voting from one device while wallet is on another.

sequence: vSpaceVote passes cryptographic challenge (random nonce bound to election ID and session)
vSpaceWallet receives challenge and generates credential presentation proof
vSpaceVote displays QR code containing challenge
vSpaceWallet returns credential presentation via WebSocket

technical_context.signing: Credential-derived keys for postMessage response signatures

infrastructure: WebSocket relay server (Azure App Service or AKS)

functional_requirements.description: postMessage protocol shall enforce origin whitelist (vSpaceVote.com and vSpaceWallet.com only)
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Messages from non-whitelisted origins are silently dropped

functional_requirements.description: Cross-device QR flow shall fall back when same-browser postMessage is unavailable
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: QR code containing challenge is scannable; credential presentation completes via WebSocket relay

security_rules.implementation: Nonce bound to election ID and session timestamp
Session token validation on relay channel

features.gate_criteria: Cross-origin protocol functional. Cross-browser manual and automated tests.
features.verification_method: Cross-browser manual and automated tests; origin whitelist enforcement tests

setup_actions: Configure WebSocket relay service
Test cross-origin flows in multiple browsers
Verify QR code generation and scanning
Validate origin whitelist enforcement

conversational_ai.description: NLWeb Conversational Interfaces with MCP Server capability for agent interoperability

features.name: NLWeb Conversational Interfaces
features.overview: Two NLWeb instances provide conversational AI query capabilities over election data (vSpaceVote.com) and credential state (vSpaceWallet.com). Each instance simultaneously functions as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for agent interoperability. The vSpaceVote instance indexes election manifests, published records, tally results, and verification reports. The vSpaceWallet instance indexes credential types, issuance status, and wallet configuration.
features.business_value: Enables voters, observers, journalists, and auditors to query election data and credential status using natural language. Positions both PWAs as first-class participants in the emerging agentic web.
features.user_benefits: Natural language queries for election information; agent interoperability via MCP protocol; cryptographic provenance ensures response accuracy.

technical_context.shared_infrastructure: Uvicorn ASGI process with FastHTML PWAs
technical_context.rag_constraints: Strict - 100% grounded in published election record
technical_context.provenance_hashing: All responses include cryptographic provenance hashes

functional_requirements.description: NLWeb ask method shall return Schema.org-typed JSON responses grounded in indexed election record content
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Every response item maps to a valid Schema.org type; no response contains information absent from the vector store

functional_requirements.description: MCP server endpoint shall expose ask tool for agent interoperability
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: External MCP clients can discover and invoke the ask method; responses conform to NLWeb protocol specification

functional_requirements.description: NLWeb shall operate in read-only mode during active voting periods
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: No state-changing operations (ballot casting, credential presentation) can be triggered via NLWeb queries

functional_requirements.description: All NLWeb responses shall include cryptographic provenance hashes linking to source data items
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each response embeds a hash verifiable against the authentic election record content in the vector store

functional_requirements.description: Custom tools (BallotLookupTool, TallyExplorerTool, CredentialStatusTool) shall resolve queries against published data only
functional_requirements.acceptance_criteria: BallotLookupTool resolves tracking codes; TallyExplorerTool navigates tally tree; CredentialStatusTool checks serial numbers without revealing voter identity

security_constraints.implementation: 100% grounded in published election record; strict RAG constraints
No state-changing operations during voting windows
CredentialStatusTool reveals only serial number presence
Each response embeds hash of source data items

features.gate_criteria: NLWeb instances deployed with domain-specific config. Query accuracy validation against published record.
features.verification_method: Query accuracy validation against published record; RAG constraint enforcement tests

setup_actions: Provision Azure OpenAI Service with appropriate model deployment
Configure Azure AI Search index with Schema.org schema
Index election manifest and sample published records
Configure NLWeb instances with domain-specific tools
Test MCP server endpoint accessibility
Verify RAG constraint enforcement

dependencies.name: fastapi
dependencies.purpose: REST API framework for electionguard-api-python extensions

dependencies.name: msal
dependencies.purpose: OAuth2 token acquisition for Microsoft Entra Verified ID

dependencies.name: uvicorn
dependencies.purpose: Production ASGI server shared between FastHTML and NLWeb

dependencies.name: starlette
dependencies.purpose: ASGI framework layer for middleware stack

entra_verified_id.licensing: Azure AD Premium P2 or Microsoft Entra Suite

azure_openai.purpose: RAG-based natural language queries over election data
constraints: No access to decryption keys, guardian shares, or voter identity

services.name: Azure Front Door
services.purpose: Global CDN, DDoS protection, TLS termination

services.name: Azure Key Vault
services.purpose: HSM-backed signing keys, Entra SP credentials, SAAC issuer parameters

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Vector store backend for NLWeb instances

phases.gate_conditions: Entra sandbox issuance/presentation flows succeed. Oblivious credential derivation works. 100-voter simulation with live Entra VCs. FastHTML skeletons deployed.
verification_methods: F-105: 100-voter simulation with live Entra VCs
F-107: Cross-browser manual and automated tests
F-108: Query accuracy validation against published record

system_constraints.rationale: Architecture depends on Azure App Service, AKS, Cosmos DB, Key Vault, AI Search, and Entra

system_constraints.constraint: Pre-release status — not for production elections
system_constraints.rationale: Repository README explicitly states this limitation
Safe, Accountable, Fair, Explainable, Data-governed as foundational design constraints

augmented_specific_constraints.constraint: All Azure credentials must be provided before ralph_loop begins
augmented_specific_constraints.rationale: Prevents blocking on authentication during execution

augmented_specific_constraints.constraint: Entra Verified ID operations must complete pre-election day
augmented_specific_constraints.rationale: Temporal separation - no cloud dependency on election day

augmented_specific_constraints.constraint: NLWeb operates read-only during voting periods
augmented_specific_constraints.rationale: Prevents AI-driven state changes during active voting
